expected_accepted_values: laws of the State of Delaware

notes: Amendment does not restate the fee — extractor must NOT fabricate a value.

inline_content: This is a simple letter with no fund details or private equity terms.
This is a simple letter with no fund details or private equity terms.
ARTICLE 5 — FEES.  Section 5.1.  The Partnership shall pay to the General Partner an annual management fee equal to two percent (2.00%) of aggregate Capital Commitments.

Section 6.2. The General Partner shall receive a Carried Interest equal to twenty percent (20%) of all net profits attributable to Limited Partners, after first distributing the Preferred Return of eight percent (8.0%) per annum compounded annually.
notes: Both carry and pref are nearby — extractor must not confuse them.

inline_content:
# HORIZON EQUITY PARTNERS IV — KEY TERMS

Fund name: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. (the 'Partnership').
General Partner: Horizon Alpha GP, LLC.
Vintage year: 2024.
Target fund size: USD 750,000,000 (target), with a $1,000,000,000 hard cap.
GP commitment: 2.0% of aggregate Capital Commitments.
Key Person: Amelia Chen, Managing Partner. A Key Person Event occurs if Ms. Chen ceases to devote substantially all business time to the Partnership.
Management fee: 2.0% per annum of aggregate Capital Commitments during the commitment period, stepping down to 1.5% on invested cost thereafter.
Preferred Return: 8% per annum (European waterfall).
Carried Interest: 20% of profits above the Preferred Return, with 100% GP catch-up.
Governing Law: State of Delaware.
Fund Term: 10 years, with two one-year extensions at GP discretion.
Commitment Period: 5 years from the Final Closing Date.

# FUND TERMS — HILLSIDE OPPORTUNITIES FUND II

Hillside Opportunities Fund II, L.P. uses a straight-carry distribution model.
There is no preferred return or hurdle rate; the General Partner's carried interest applies from the first dollar of profit.
Management fee: 1.8% per annum on Capital Commitments.

# AMENDED AND RESTATED TERMS — RIVERSIDE CAPITAL FUND V

During the Commitment Period the Management Fee shall be 2.25% per annum of aggregate Capital Commitments. Following the Commitment Period the Management Fee shall step down to 1.75% per annum on Invested Cost. The initial/step-down rate reflects the two-stage fee structure approved by the LPAC.

# TERMS — EUROPEAN LUX FUND S.C.A.
Management fee: 1,75% per annum of Capital Commitments.
Preferred return: 6,5% per annum.
Carried interest: 15,0% of profits.

# TERMS — EMPIRE INFRASTRUCTURE FUND II, L.P.
Governing Law: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of New York.

# DISTRIBUTION WATERFALL — TIERED CARRY FUND L.P.

After return of Capital Contributions and a Preferred Return of 7% per annum, profits are split: 80% to LPs / 20% to GP until an IRR of 15% is achieved; thereafter 70% to LPs / 30% to GP. The stated headline Carried Interest Rate is 20%.
